title: Seven-Day Creation Cycle — Temporal Frequencies
description: The seven days of creation mapped to a harmonic series. Each day corresponds to a frequency that is a harmonic of the fundamental 7-day cycle. The 7th day (Shabbat) completes the cycle and represents the octave-like 'return to source.'

fundamental.interpretation: One complete creation cycle = 1 unit of time

days.name: Dry Land / Plants
days.genesis: Let dry land appear; let earth produce vegetation

days.name: Luminaries
days.genesis: Let there be lights in the firmament

days.name: Sea Creatures / Birds
days.genesis: Let waters teem with living creatures

days.name: Land Creatures / Man
days.genesis: Let earth produce living creatures; Let us make man

days.name: Shabbat / Rest
days.genesis: God rested on the seventh day — completion
days.special: 7th harmonic = blue note; 7 = completion in Hebrew numerology; Shabbat=702=27×26=27×YHWH
